title: Senior SEO Specialist at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates family as a SEO Specialist in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates:
BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt Asia Pacific Associates!
